basic_details.job_title: NIT Silchar – Junior Research Fellow – 1 Posts
basic_details.short_information: NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 offers 1 Junior Research Fellow post for candidates possessing B.Tech/B.E and M.Tech/M.E in ECE or equivalent qualification, with email applications open till 15-06-2026 on the official website nits.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in ECE and M.Tech/M.E in ECE or equivalent, B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in ECE, Minimum 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category, Minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA at both UG and PG for SC/ST/PwD category

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.
seo_tags: NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
